blockers.title: Desktop packaging must wait until Brain 7.25.5 is committed, tagged, and public
blockers.resolution: Medium severity flow dependency; verify Desktop bundle source after Brain publication before building Desktop 0.39.1.

gates.title: Local Memory starts from conservative user-content roots and cleans legacy whole-disk state
evidence_required: Default root migration removes legacy disk roots but preserves user content and email roots
System/cache/dependency/noisy trees remain skipped by default
Doctor hygiene repairs removed root residue

gates.title: Explicit user include can override default skipped/system/noisy rules without bypassing manual exclusions
evidence_required: A user-added skipped subtree under a core default root is registered as its own root
Explicit user include roots survive effective-root de-duplication and hygiene
Explicit user include changes privacy classification only for that intentional root

gates.title: File-type allowlist and user include/exclude overrides remain configurable
evidence_required: Default file type rules prioritize extractable documents and metadata/image classes
User include rules can add an extension that Core would otherwise ignore
User exclude rules can suppress an allowed extension

gates.title: Brain internal text stays English while Desktop owns localized user-facing copy
evidence_required: Brain LocalIndex operator messages are English
Desktop exposes English and Spanish labels for folder modes, rule sources, reasons, and file actions
Desktop normal UI avoids raw internal tokens such as normal, user, extract, metadata, or ignore

gates.title: Desktop-managed installs remain pinned to the Core-approved Python 3.12 ABI
evidence_required: Desktop-visible Python guidance says Python 3.12, not 3.13
Brain startup preflight rejects Desktop-managed Python versions outside the Core-pinned ABI
Coverage includes the Desktop-managed Python 3.12 contract

gates.title: Public release surfaces and integration artifacts are aligned for v7.25.5
evidence_required: README, llms, homepage, blog index, blog post, changelog page, and sitemap reference v7.25.5
Claude plugin, ClawHub skill, and OpenClaw package metadata reference 7.25.5
Release smoke and readiness checks validate the v7.25.5 contract before tag publish
